channel.title: Sous Chef Signal
channel.description: Fresh takes for home cooks systematizing weeknight dinners.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/MealPrepSunday is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the sauces community this week.

item.title: The knife skills checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified knife skills purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of pantry
item.description: The most common early stumbles in pantry, and the cheap corrections that fix them for home cooks systematizing weeknight dinners.

item.title: "pantry staples list" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about pantry staples list through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your sauces questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the sauces questions home cooks systematizing weeknight dinners keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in knife skills with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest knife skills adjustments that home cooks systematizing weeknight dinners report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: pantry staples list
item.description: The persistent myths around pantry staples list, stress-tested against what home cooks systematizing weeknight dinners actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your templates in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying templates project for home cooks systematizing weeknight dinners — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: 5 Weeknight Dinner Templates to Save Time

item.description: Get your pantry in order with these 10 tips.
